ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security associated with the dividend */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issuer of the dividend */,
  "declared_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was declared */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the record of shareholders is taken */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend is payable to shareholders */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Date the stock starts trading ex-dividend */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment per share */,
  "currency_type" TEXT /* Type of currency or asset being distributed (e.g., U.S. Currency, Foreign Currency, Stock Dividends) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dividend payment (e.g., declared, paid, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  "tax_implications" TEXT /* Any tax-related information for the dividend */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the dividend payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dividend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dividend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_currency_type FOREIGN KEY ("currency_type") REFERENCES dividend_types ("dividend_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_issuer_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuer_id") REFERENCES issuers ("issuer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_currency_type FOREIGN KEY ("currency_type") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., Common Stock, Preferred Stock) */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issuer of the security */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Last trade date of the security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the security record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the security record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_issuer_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuer_id") REFERENCES issuers ("issuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issuers" (
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuer */,
  "issuer_name" TEXT /* Name of the issuer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the issuer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the issuer */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the issuer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the issuer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the issuer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issuer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the issuer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate of the currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the currency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the currency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_types" (
  "dividend_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend type */,
  "dividend_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dividend type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dividend type */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or code representing the dividend type */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the dividend type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dividend type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dividend type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, financial analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dividend record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividends ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dividend record that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_history_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividends ("dividend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of dividends paid in the reporting period */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for the total amount */,
  "currency_type" TEXT /* Type of currency used in the report (e.g., U.S. Currency, Foreign Currency) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_reports_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)
